creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to parv from comment #0)
> (Re)Build of mail/p5-Mail-Mbox-MessageParser (r383942) on FreeBSD 8
> (r281256) was started as ...
> 
>   portmaster --no-confirm -H -D mail/p5-Mail-Mbox-MessageParser
> 
> 
> ... but build stalls while waiting for input (as noticed in the log file)
> for the port to set/use paths to various compression commands. After blindly
> pressing "Return" (in effect, accepting the found paths as is), build
> proceeds.
> 
> Given the options to portmaster, there should not be a need for manual
> intervention in this case.

Agreed. I've sent a request to it's (portmaster's) previous maintainer,
to get his tree. Once I've acquired it, I'll see how I might best
resolve this. :)

--Chris
